questions.question: What university did Forrest attend in Forrest Gump?
What company was founded by actress Jessica Alba in 2011?
In the song 'Regulate,' Nate Dogg 'just hit the Eastside of the L.B.C. on a mission' to do what?
questions.answer: Trying to find Mr. Warren G.

questions.question: Pedro from The Real World shined a light on this public issue.
What Chili's jingle, introduced in 1986, announced one's longing for a specific cut of meat?
questions.answer: I want my baby back ribs
